description: 稳重配色、图文平衡、品牌化版面、适度留白

identity.composition: 深海军蓝与暖白品牌画布，图像区域和文本区保持稳定比例，以横向带和大留白组织节奏。
identity.hierarchy: 品牌章标题建立语境，核心结论稳居主轴，指标和说明以成组卡片支撑。
identity.image_treatment: 使用宽幅或纵向品牌影像，保留自然色，统一深蓝蒙版与金色细线标记。
identity.module_language: 克制圆角、细金线、暖灰纸张感、品牌色页签与稳定比例卡片。
identity.chart_evidence: 品牌色阶、水平基线和年度式指标组；来源放在页脚或证据带中。
identity.motion: 轻柔淡入与短距离横移；保持庄重节奏，避免快速连续切换。

font_stacks.display: Georgia, Source Han Serif SC, serif

canvas.density: medium-low, generous whitespace around one brand statement

layout_variants.use: process, strategy pillars, or value chain

components.chart: Use navy, blue, sage, and gold in a single hierarchy; keep baselines and values visible; avoid rainbow series.
components.table: Use warm-white rows, generous vertical padding, navy headers, and gold key-row rules.
components.evidence_card: Place source and interpretation in a wide branded band; keep provenance visible but quiet.
components.image: Use one high-quality hero crop or paired documentary image, natural color, navy overlay, and restrained gold locator.

motion.enter: opacity with 14-18px horizontal or vertical movement over 460-620ms
motion.stagger: reveal grouped narrative modules, never every word
